lectionary.gospelTitle: Jesus Is Tempted in the Desert

readings.summary: Moses tells the Israelites of God's care for them.

readings.citation:
Ps 91:1-2, 10-11, 12-13, 14-15, R. see v.15b
Be with me, Lord, when I am in trouble.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 91:1-2, 10-11, 12-13, 14-15, R. see v.15b
Be with me, Lord, when I am in trouble.

readings.summary: All who call upon the Lord will be saved.

One does not live on bread alone, but on every word
that comes forth from the mouth of God.
Jesus is tempted in the desert.

antiphons.text:
One does not live by bread alone, but by every word
that comes forth from the mouth of God.

antiphons.citation: Communion Antiphon • Option II | Cf. Ps 91 (90):4
antiphons.text:
The Lord will conceal you with his pinions,
and under his wings you will trust.
